projects.title: Police MIS Dashboard System
projects.description: Design, develop, test, and debug management system handling 200+ data records with evidence logging and mapping functionality. Applied analytical thinking to explore crime data patterns for reporting and research purposes. Conduct research and learning for AI-driven predictive modeling using emerging technologies and structured analytical approaches.

projects.title: Sankat Mochan Healthcare Portal
projects.description: Collaborate with cross-functional development teams to design and develop hospital management software with AI chatbot integration. Applied engineering and analytical skills for responsive design; improved workflow efficiency by 40% through RESTful API development. Features real-time queue management, intelligent bed allocation, pharmacy inventory, and patient-doctor coordination.

projects.title: JPL/PPL Programming Platform
projects.description: Developed comprehensive software solution with React.js and Node.js following software engineering principles and coding standards. Analyze technical problems and propose creative solutions; achieved latency reduction serving 400+ concurrent users. Features include participant registration system, real-time quiz interface with Monaco Editor for live code compilation, automated result tracking, and AI chatbot support.
features: Monaco Editor for live code compilation

projects.title: Asusual.in - E-commerce Platform
projects.description: Design, develop, test, and debug scalable full-stack software solution meeting business requirements. Applied best practices and coding standards achieving 80+ Lighthouse score; implemented comprehensive testing protocols. Developed a complete e-commerce solution with product catalog, smart filtering, shopping cart, secure checkout, and admin panel.

projects.title: Zenaura.in - Crystal & Cannel Store
projects.description: Developed premium e-commerce platform for luxury crystal and cannel products with advanced features including product filtering, wishlist, and real-time inventory tracking. Implemented Google OAuth authentication, Razorpay payment integration, and optimized for high performance.

projects.title: The Gypsy Adventures - Tourism Platform
projects.description: Developed and maintained backend architecture for The Gypsy Adventures, implementing RESTful APIs, admin panel features, and data management modules. Collaborated with frontend developers to build and optimize multiple React pages; improved website load speed by 30% through SEO enhancement and performance tuning. Contributed to TGA Storage, a media optimization module for compressing and storing images and videos efficiently, reducing server storage usage and load times.
features: Tour package browsing and booking system
Hotel booking integration with external APIs

projects.title: BSY Consulting Website
projects.description: Developed full-stack web applications using MERN stack during internship at BSY Consulting. Built RESTful APIs, integrated third-party services, and implemented responsive frontend designs with React and Material-UI. Successfully delivered 3 client projects with 98% client satisfaction.

projects.title: Gaming Platform
projects.description: Multiplayer gaming platform with real-time interactions. Built using WebSocket for real-time communication, React for frontend, and Node.js for backend server. Features include real-time game state synchronization, player matchmaking, and leaderboard system.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio v3.0
projects.description: Modern portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and experience. Features include dark/light theme toggle, smooth animations, interactive project showcases, skills visualization, and responsive design. Optimized for performance with lazy loading and SEO best practices.

projects.title: Notepad for Writing Notes & Code
projects.description: Note-taking application with code highlighting support. Features include rich text editing, code syntax highlighting, local storage persistence, note categorization, and search functionality. Supports both plain text and code snippets with language-specific highlighting.

projects.title: Denoise The Audio
projects.description: Audio denoising application using signal processing techniques. Built with Python using libraries like NumPy, SciPy, and Librosa for audio processing. Implements various noise reduction algorithms including spectral gating and wavelet denoising.

projects.title: Insurance Premium & Payout KPI Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Developed an interactive Power BI dashboard to analyze insurance premium collections and payout performance across multiple KPIs. Tracked key metrics such as claim ratio, premium growth, and payout trends to generate actionable business insights. Cleaned and transformed raw datasets using Excel and Power Query to ensure accurate and consistent reporting.

projects.title: E-Commerce MIS Reporting & Capacity Tracker
projects.description: Created daily and monthly MIS reports using Excel Pivot Tables and formulas to track orders, payments, and delivery. Tracked KPIs and business metrics aligned with intraday and intraweek operational trends. Improved data accuracy through validation checks and standardized reporting formats, reducing manual errors.

projects.title: Weather Data Pipeline using API
projects.description: Built an end-to-end automated data pipeline extracting real-time data from OpenWeatherMap API, demonstrating pipeline design and live monitoring skills. Transformed raw JSON into structured format using Pandas and stored in PostgreSQL for analysis and reporting.

projects.title: Customer Trends & Sales Analysis
projects.description: Analyzed customer transaction and sales data using SQL joins, aggregations, and KPIs. Performed data cleaning and exploratory data analysis (EDA) using Python (Pandas). Built interactive Power BI dashboards to visualize revenue trends, customer segmentation, and product performance. Delivered insights on repeat customers, regional sales patterns, and category-wise growth.

projects.title: Cloud Banking Application (Flask + AWS)
projects.description: Built secure cloud-based banking system using Python Flask, AWS EC2, and DynamoDB for scalable account management and transaction processing. Implemented secure authentication with password hashing, session management, and transaction validation. Developed features including deposits, withdrawals, transfers, and transaction history tracking with optimized database queries. Designed scalable architecture separating presentation, business logic, and data layers for improved maintainability.
